method: weak-duality tangent-underestimator over the simple-bound box (White Prop.9 lower bound; dual repair = clip lambda>=0).
theorem_statement: The extracted multipliers (all inequality lambda >= 0 after a clip of total mass 0.00e+00) certify, via the tangent underestimator of the Lagrangian over the program's simple-bound box, that the Section-5 program optimum p* >= 0.3794506. By White (arXiv:2201.05704) Prop. 9, p* <= mu, hence mu >= 0.3794506. [Method: White. Scaling + certificate extraction + repair: ours. Not a determination of mu.]
